mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_session WHERE deleted = 0) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_session WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) AS today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_session WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN ('IN_SESSION', 'ROBOT')) AS active
SELECT status AS k, COUNT(*) AS v FROM chat_session WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status ORDER BY v DESC

SELECT agent_username AS agent, COUNT(*) AS sessions, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ENDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ended, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('IN_SESSION', 'ROBOT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active FROM chat_session WHERE deleted = 0 AND agent_username IS NOT NULL GROUP BY agent_username ORDER BY sessions DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM chat_session WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY day ASC
SELECT HOUR(created_at) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM chat_session WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() GROUP BY HOUR(created_at) ORDER BY hour ASC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE deleted = 0) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) AS today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR)) AS last_hour
SELECT from_role AS k, COUNT(*) AS v FROM chat_message WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY from_role ORDER BY v DESC
SELECT type AS k, COUNT(*) AS v FROM chat_message WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY type ORDER BY v DESC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cs_auth.wechat_user WHERE deleted = 0) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cs_auth.wechat_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) AS today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cs_auth.wechat_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND channel = 'OA') AS oa_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cs_auth.wechat_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND channel = 'WORK') AS work_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cs_auth.wechat_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND channel = 'LOCAL') AS local_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cs_auth.wechat_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND subscribe_status = 1) AS subscribed
SELECT CASE subscribe_status WHEN 1 THEN '已关注' WHEN 2 THEN '未关注' ELSE '未知' END AS k, COUNT(*) AS v FROM cs_auth.wechat_user WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY subscribe_status
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM cs_auth.wechat_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY day ASC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replay_job) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replay_job WHERE status = 'SUCCESS') AS success, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replay_job WHERE status = 'FAILED') AS failed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replay_job WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' AND DATE(finished_at) = CURDATE()) AS today_success
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replay_frame) AS total_frames, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration_ms), 0) FROM replay_job WHERE status = 'SUCCESS') AS total_duration_ms

SELECT DATE(finished_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_cnt FROM replay_job WHERE finished_at IS NOT NULL AND finished_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(finished_at) ORDER BY day ASC
SELECT status AS k, COUNT(*) AS v FROM ticket WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kyc_application) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kyc_application WHERE status = 'APPROVED') AS approved, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kyc_application WHERE status = 'REJECTED') AS rejected, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kyc_application WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) AS today
SELECT status AS k, COUNT(*) AS v FROM financial_order WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status

SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM financial_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'SETTLED' AND DATE(paid_at) = CURDATE()) AS today_settled, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM financial_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'SETTLED') AS total_settled
